pageDescription: Calculate your body surface area (BSA) using various methods including DuBois, Mosteller, Haycock, and Gehan-George formulas

gehan_george.title: Gehan-George Method (1970)
gehan_george.description: BSA = 0.0235 × Weight^0.51456 × Height^0.42246 (based on extensive data)

criticalWarningsList.notDiagnostic: This calculator provides estimates only and is not a diagnostic tool
criticalWarningsList.individualVariation: BSA varies based on body composition and shape

importantNotesList: BSA is used to determine dosages for certain medications
Different methods may produce slightly different results
Consult healthcare professionals for medical applications
BSA should be considered alongside other health metrics

healthyRangeDetails.title: Average BSA Values
healthyRangeDetails.description: Adult men: 1.9 m², Adult women: 1.6 m²
healthyRangeDetails.association: BSA is used in medical contexts for drug dosing and physiological measurements.

messages.enterMeasurements: Enter your measurements to calculate your body surface area
messages.bsaResult: Your body surface area is {bsa} m² using the {method} method
messages.ageWarning: For children, specific formulas may be more appropriate

disclaimer.title: Important Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: This calculator provides estimates based on mathematical formulas and should not be used as a substitute for professional medical advice. Individual results may vary based on factors not accounted for in these calculations.

seekHelp.title: Consult a Healthcare Professional
seekHelp.content: If you need BSA for medical purposes, please consult with a healthcare professional who can provide accurate calculations based on your complete medical history and individual circumstances.

errors.heightCm: Please enter valid height in cm

tooltips.age: Age can affect BSA calculations for children
tooltips.method: Different formulas may be more appropriate for different populations

enter_patient_details_to_calculate_body_: Enter patient details to calculate Body Surface Area using multiple formulas
this_calculator_uses_7_major_formulas_in:
This calculator uses 7 major formulas including Du Bois,
                        Mosteller, Haycock, Gehan & George, Boyd, Fujimoto, and Takahira methods for comprehensive
                        comparison.
bsa_values_are_normalized_to_m_these_for:
BSA values are normalized to m². These formulas are widely used
                        in clinical and pharmaceutical calculations. This calculator is for informational purposes only.
                        Consult a healthcare provider for medical use.
body_surface_area_bsa_is_a_measurement_o:
Body Surface Area (BSA) is a measurement of the total surface area of the human body. It's
                        crucial for determining appropriate medication dosages, especially in chemotherapy, and for
                        various physiological calculations.
normal_adult_bsa_ranges_from_15_to_20_m_:
Normal adult BSA ranges from 1.5 to 2.0 m². Average adult BSA is
                          approximately 1.7 m².
